audit_items.proof_trace: Both freed pointers are safe: `item` in `addReplyGopherItem` is freed at L44 via `sdsfree` after `addReplyProto` returns, with no subsequent use; C argument evaluation guarantees `sdslen(item)` is computed before the free. In `processGopherRequest`, `keyname` is freed at L73 via `decrRefCount` as the final statement — no dereference follows. No double-free paths exist in either function.
